Claim Your Ethereum Reward

X

Join the collaboration between Discord and the Ethereum Foundation to claim free Ethereum based on your holdings. Receive 1% of your Ethereum value as a reward while engaging with a vibrant community.

Features

Explore the unique features of our collaboration that enhance community engagement and reward participation.

Community Initiatives

Engage with a vibrant community, participate in events, and share your ideas!

Resources

Access valuable resources to help you navigate the world of Ethereum and Discord.
